name: home-guardian
description: Unified CLI command center to diagnose, control, and query high-fidelity WiFi biometric vitals.

commands.name: guardian-status
commands.description: Exposes real-time system and hardware diagnostics, auditing scientific packages, locked zombified PIDs, and WiFi power-saving states.

commands.name: guardian-start
commands.description: Safely kills zombified port 8080 listeners and boots the high-performance Python spatial engine.

commands.name: guardian-vitals
commands.description: Fetches the latest registered occupant vital sign signatures directly from the SQLite analytics database.
commands.command: sqlite3 wifi_guardian.db "SELECT occupant_id, heart_rate, breathing_rate, hrv, temp, spo2, datetime(timestamp/1000, 'unixepoch', 'localtime') FROM vital_snapshots ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 5;"

commands.name: guardian-optimize
commands.description: Optimizes your host network adapter parameters by turning high-latency WiFi power saving off.
commands.command: sudo iw dev wlo1 set power_save off && echo '✅ Adapter optimized for micro-Doppler accuracy!'
